content: Firebase apps need CSP connect-src for firestore.googleapis.com, identitytoolkit.googleapis.com, securetoken.googleapis.com; frame-src https://*.firebaseapp.com (auth handler __/auth/handler); Cloudinary needs connect-src api.cloudinary.com and img-src res.cloudinary.com. Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin breaks signInWithPopup window.closed polling (firebase-js-sdk #8541, #8295); same-origin-allow-popups required; residual console warning comes from accounts.google.com report-only COOP.
